_comment: Forever Party Rentals — SKU-level product catalog for /product-<slug>.html pages. Sprint 3.10 of the competitor-gap plan. Pairs with sku_template.html + generate_sku_pages.py. Each SKU ALSO links to top-9 product-per-city pages to flow PageRank into the geo-silo we already built.

_schema.name: Human-readable product name (H1 + <title>)
_schema.category: One of: tent, chair, table, dance-floor — must match a key in products.json so we can render breadcrumbs + sibling cards + category links consistently
_schema.heroImage: Squarespace CDN URL — reuse paths already catalogued in products.json; don't fabricate
_schema.metaDescription: <= 155 chars — used for <meta description> + OG + Twitter
_schema.shortDescription: One-sentence pitch under the H1 in the hero
_schema.longDescription: 1-2 paragraph product story shown in the intro section. Plain text (no HTML).
_schema.specs: [{label, value}] rows rendered in the spec sheet
_schema.startingPriceCAD: Numeric anchor in CAD — used for 'Starting at $X' + Offer.price schema
_schema.priceUnit: day | event — controls the /day vs /event suffix
_schema.priceRange: Formatted string for LocalBusiness.priceRange — keep tight to this SKU's actual band
_schema.topCityLinks: 9 city slugs to link into (tier-1 first). Renderer looks up the correct product-per-city URL via category + city slug

_priceNote: Prices are conservative public anchors derived from the competitor-research document at site/_build/competitor_research.md (Rowe 10×10 popups $105-155; Rowe marquee baseline $275-450; Pedersen bundled chair ~$15.90 from SERPs; Celebration delivery $70 Coquitlam). Forever retail-to-public pricing may differ — confirm with operator before launch. Single source of truth; update here and regenerate.

white-chiavari-chair.name: White Chiavari Chair Rental
white-chiavari-chair.heroAlt: White Chiavari chair rentals for weddings — Forever Party Rentals
white-chiavari-chair.metaDescription: White Chiavari chair rentals across Metro Vancouver. From $4/day, delivered & stacked. Individually cleaned, wedding-reception ready. Book online 24/7.
white-chiavari-chair.shortDescription: The reception-standard white Chiavari chair with soft ivory cushion — delivered, stacked, and placed to your floor plan.
white-chiavari-chair.longDescription: Forever Party Rentals stocks a full inventory of White Chiavari chairs — the wedding-reception standard across the Lower Mainland. Every chair is individually wiped, inspected, and stacked before it leaves our Surrey warehouse; no scuffed legs, no cracked spindles, no torn cushions. Our crew delivers, places them to your floor plan (ceremony rows, round-table seating, or mixed configurations), and collects at end of event — no setup surcharge when bundled with delivery. Mix with Fanback folding or Resin Garden chairs in the same order for outdoor-ceremony / indoor-reception setups; no mixing fee.
bullets: Classic white Chiavari — the wedding-reception standard
Individually cleaned and inspected before every event
Delivered, stacked, and placed to your floor plan
Pair with round or banquet tables in one quote
No mixing surcharge with Fanback or Garden chairs

fanback-garden-chair.name: Fanback Folding Chair Rental
fanback-garden-chair.heroAlt: White Fanback folding chair rentals — Forever Party Rentals
fanback-garden-chair.metaDescription: White Fanback folding chair rentals from $3.50/day. Durable, weather-ready, perfect for outdoor ceremonies and community events. Delivered across Metro Vancouver.
fanback-garden-chair.shortDescription: Elegant white Fanback folding chairs — durable, weather-resistant, and perfect for outdoor ceremonies.
fanback-garden-chair.longDescription: Our White Fanback folding chair is the workhorse choice for outdoor weddings, community events, graduations, and anywhere you need a beautiful chair that can handle Lower Mainland weather. The fan-pattern back is lightweight but rigid, stacks 10 high, and wipes clean between events. We deliver them flat-packed and our crew unfolds and stages to your ceremony layout, then collects at end of event. Popular pairing: Fanback outside for the ceremony, Chiavari inside for the reception — both styles on one delivery.
bullets: Elegant fan-pattern back — reads formal outdoors
Weather-resistant molded resin frame
Flat-pack delivery — crew unfolds and stages on-site
Pairs cleanly with Chiavari for indoor/outdoor events
Stack-drop available for pickup orders

resin-garden-chair.name: Resin Garden Chair Rental
resin-garden-chair.heroAlt: White resin garden chair rentals for outdoor events — Forever Party Rentals
resin-garden-chair.metaDescription: Resin garden chair rentals from $3/day across Metro Vancouver. Weather-resistant, stackable, ideal for outdoor weddings and backyard events. Book online 24/7.
resin-garden-chair.shortDescription: Durable, weather-resistant white garden chairs — our most affordable outdoor seating option.
resin-garden-chair.longDescription: The Resin Garden chair is our budget-forward outdoor seating option. Injection-moulded from UV-resistant white resin, it stands up to sun, rain, grass stakes, and rough handling — ideal for backyard weddings, poolside celebrations, beach ceremonies, and any large-volume outdoor event where Chiavari or Fanback pricing doesn't pencil. Stacks 15 high for efficient delivery; our crew lays them out to your floor plan or stack-drops on site for pickup orders. Cleaned and inspected before every rental.
bullets: Most affordable outdoor chair in our lineup
UV-resistant — handles sun and rain alike
Stacks 15 high — efficient for large orders
Delivered, placed, and collected by our crew
Cleaned and inspected before every event

round-table-5ft.name: 5ft Round Table Rental
round-table-5ft.heroAlt: 5ft round table rentals for wedding receptions — Forever Party Rentals
round-table-5ft.metaDescription: 5ft round table rentals from $10/day. Seats 8 comfortably. The classic wedding-reception configuration — delivered and set up across Metro Vancouver.
round-table-5ft.shortDescription: The classic 5-foot round — seats 8 comfortably and the most-booked reception table in our inventory.
round-table-5ft.longDescription: Our 5-foot round table is the most-requested reception configuration across Lower Mainland weddings. Seats 8 guests comfortably (10 at a squeeze) and gives centerpieces enough real estate to breathe. Plywood top with folding steel legs — lightweight enough to restage quickly, rigid enough to handle a full place setting and floral arrangement. Every table is wiped and inspected before loading; our crew unfolds and positions each one to your floor plan at no extra charge. Pair with Chiavari chairs and a 20×40 marquee tent for a complete 100-guest reception.
bullets: Seats 8 comfortably — the wedding-reception workhorse
Wiped and inspected before every event
Crew unfolds and positions to your floor plan
Bundle with Chiavari chairs + marquee tent for one quote
Classic 30" seated height — fits any linen

banquet-table-6ft.name: 6ft Banquet Table Rental
banquet-table-6ft.heroAlt: 6ft rectangular banquet table rentals — Forever Party Rentals
banquet-table-6ft.metaDescription: 6ft rectangular banquet table rentals from $10/day. Seats 6-8, the most versatile event table. Delivered, set up, and collected across Metro Vancouver.
banquet-table-6ft.shortDescription: The most versatile table in our inventory — 6ft banquet, seats 6-8, works for anything.
banquet-table-6ft.longDescription: If you can only rent one type of table, rent this one. The 6-foot rectangular banquet table is the single most versatile SKU in event rentals — family-style dining rows, buffet stations, gift tables, DJ booths, bar setups, registration desks, head tables. Seats 6-8 guests depending on end-seating. Plywood top, folding steel legs, weighs under 75 lb so our crew can restage quickly. Wiped and inspected before every rental; linens available through our preferred partners if you need them coordinated.

specs.label: Seats
specs.value: 6 no end seats · 8 with end seats

specs.label: Use case
specs.value: Dining rows, buffet, head table, bar, DJ, registration

bullets: Most versatile event table — 6-8 guests
Family-style, buffet, bar, DJ, head table — all covered
Under 75 lb — easy to restage mid-event
Wiped and inspected before every rental
Linen coordination through our partners

cocktail-table.name: Cocktail Highboy Table Rental
cocktail-table.heroAlt: Cocktail highboy table rentals for networking events — Forever Party Rentals
cocktail-table.metaDescription: Cocktail highboy table rentals from $15/day. Standing-height tables for networking, pre-dinner mingling, and wedding receptions. Delivered across Metro Vancouver.
cocktail-table.shortDescription: Standing-height highboys for networking, pre-dinner mingling, and reception bars.
cocktail-table.longDescription: Highboy cocktail tables are the quiet superstar of any corporate or wedding reception — they create natural mingling spots, break up a room's sightlines, and give guests somewhere to park a drink without committing to a chair. We stock 42"-tall round highboys with folding legs for quick staging. Pair them with bistro lighting for an instant pre-dinner zone; most customers rent 1 highboy per 10-12 standing guests. Spandex covers available through our linen partners.

specs.label: Use case
specs.value: Cocktail hour, networking, pre-dinner, bar stations

bullets: Standing-height — perfect for mingling + networking
1 highboy per 10-12 guests is the rule of thumb
Pairs beautifully with bistro string lighting
Folds for compact transport
Spandex covers available on request

popup-tent-10x10.name: 10x10 Popup Tent Rental
popup-tent-10x10.heroAlt: 10x10 popup tent rental for small events — Forever Party Rentals
popup-tent-10x10.metaDescription: 10x10 popup tent rentals from $120/day. Quick-set canopies for intimate gatherings, markets, and short-notice needs. Delivery or pickup across Metro Vancouver.
popup-tent-10x10.shortDescription: Easy-set 10×10 canopy — the right call for small gatherings, market stalls, and short-notice needs.
popup-tent-10x10.longDescription: Not every event needs a 40-foot marquee. The 10×10 popup tent is our quick-set canopy — ideal for small backyard gatherings (covers ~20 standing or 1 six-foot table), market stalls, vendor booths at community events, and any situation where you need shelter up in under 30 minutes. Rent it with delivery-and-setup or pick it up from our Surrey warehouse if you'd rather stage it yourself. Available with optional sidewalls and weighted-ballast kits for pavement installs.
bullets: Quick-set — under 30 minutes from arrival to up
Covers 20 standing guests or one 6ft banquet table
Pickup or full delivery-and-setup both available
Sidewalls + weight kits for pavement installs
Popular for markets, vendor booths, small backyards

marquee-tent-20x20.name: 20x20 Marquee Tent Rental
marquee-tent-20x20.heroAlt: 20x20 marquee tent rental — Forever Party Rentals
marquee-tent-20x20.metaDescription: 20x20 marquee tent rentals from $400/event. Seats up to 40 guests, free-span aluminium frame, engineered for Lower Mainland weather. Delivered and set up by our crew.
marquee-tent-20x20.shortDescription: Intimate 20×20 marquee — seats up to 40 guests under an engineered free-span frame.
marquee-tent-20x20.longDescription: The 20×20 marquee is our smallest 'real' event tent — a high-peak aluminium free-span frame with solid sidewalls, proper tie-downs, and no centre pole. Seats 40 guests at round tables or 48 at banquet rows, with room for a head table and a small dance floor. Our crew delivers, anchors (stakes or ballast based on surface), installs sidewalls, and returns for end-of-event takedown. This is the tent for intimate backyard weddings, small corporate lunches, and milestone celebrations that don't need a cathedral.
bullets: Free-span aluminium frame — no centre pole
Seats 40 round-table, 48 banquet
Sidewalls + tie-downs included
Anchors to grass, pavement, or mixed surfaces
Crew installs and collects — no DIY

marquee-tent-20x40.name: 20x40 Marquee Tent Rental
marquee-tent-20x40.heroAlt: 20x40 marquee tent rental for weddings — Forever Party Rentals
marquee-tent-20x40.metaDescription: 20x40 marquee tent rentals from $700/event. Seats 80 round-table or 100 banquet — the most-booked wedding tent in our inventory. Delivered and set up.
marquee-tent-20x40.shortDescription: The most-booked wedding tent in our inventory — seats 80 round-table or 100 banquet.
marquee-tent-20x40.longDescription: If you're planning a wedding for 80-100 guests, the 20×40 is almost certainly the tent. Free-span frame (no centre pole to design around), solid sidewalls, and enough floor for a head table + round tables + a 12×12 dance floor without feeling cramped. We've staked this tent at wineries, staged it on golf-course greens, and ballasted it on stamped concrete patios across the Lower Mainland. Delivery, anchoring, sidewall install, and takedown are all included — you don't touch anything.
bullets: Seats 80 round-table, 100 banquet
Fits a 12×12 dance floor without cramping
Free-span frame — design without a centre pole
Most-booked tent in our inventory
Delivery, setup, sidewalls, takedown all included

marquee-tent-20x60.name: 20x60 Marquee Tent Rental
marquee-tent-20x60.heroAlt: 20x60 marquee tent rental for large weddings — Forever Party Rentals
marquee-tent-20x60.metaDescription: 20x60 marquee tent rentals from $1050/event. Seats 120 round-table or 150 banquet with room for dance floor + head table. Delivered and set up by our crew.
marquee-tent-20x60.shortDescription: The 120-150 guest workhorse — seats a large wedding with room for dance floor, head table, and catering.
marquee-tent-20x60.longDescription: When your guest list creeps past 100 and the 20×40 starts feeling cramped, the 20×60 is the natural step up. Same free-span aluminium frame, same solid sidewalls, same install flow — just 50% more floor. Plenty of room for 120 seated at rounds with a dance floor, or 150 at banquet rows, or a traditional ceremony-then-reception flip. Heaters and bistro lighting bolt in cleanly. Delivery, anchoring, sidewall install, and takedown all included.

specs.label: Add-ons
specs.value: Heaters, bistro lights, dance floor bundle

bullets: 120 round-table or 150 banquet — the large-wedding workhorse
Room for dance floor + head table + catering prep
Heaters and bistro lighting bolt straight in
Free-span aluminium — no centre pole
Full install + takedown included

marquee-tent-40x80.name: 40x80 Marquee Tent Rental
marquee-tent-40x80.heroAlt: 40x80 marquee tent rental for large events and galas — Forever Party Rentals
marquee-tent-40x80.metaDescription: 40x80 marquee tent rentals from $2400/event. Seats 250+ with full dance floor and head table — our largest frame tent. Delivered and set up.
marquee-tent-40x80.shortDescription: Our largest frame tent — 300+ guests with full dance floor and staging.
marquee-tent-40x80.longDescription: The 40×80 is our largest standard frame tent — 3200 square feet of clearspan, 18-foot peaks, and enough room for 300+ seated guests plus a large dance floor, staging, and a full catering line. We stage this one for large galas, multi-day festivals, and weddings where the guest list is north of 250. Crew install takes most of a day; plan backwards from your event start time. Pair with heaters and bistro lights for a fully dressed space, or leave it clean for custom draping and uplighting.

specs.label: Install
specs.value: Plan a full crew-day ahead of event

bullets: Our largest frame tent — 300+ seated
Room for dance floor, staging, and full catering
Clearspan 3200 sq ft — no interior poles
Ideal for galas, festivals, large weddings
Crew takes most of a day to install — plan ahead

black-white-dance-floor.name: Black & White Checkered Dance Floor Rental
black-white-dance-floor.heroAlt: Black and white checkered dance floor rental — Forever Party Rentals
black-white-dance-floor.metaDescription: Black & white checkered dance floor rentals from $800/event. Professional subfloor levels over grass, carpet, or tent flooring. Sizes 12x12 to 20x20.
black-white-dance-floor.shortDescription: Our signature checkered floor — professionally levelled, installed, and collected.
black-white-dance-floor.longDescription: The black-and-white checkered dance floor is our signature rental — an interlocking panel system on an engineered subfloor that levels cleanly across grass, carpet, or any uneven surface. Sizes scale from 12×12 (50 guests) up to 20×20 (200+ dancers). Our crew stages the floor first — before florals, staging, or head tables build around it — and levels every panel before the first guest arrives. End-of-night takedown is included. Pair with a 20×40 marquee and you have a full reception package in one delivery.

specs.label: Subfloor
specs.value: Included — levels over grass, carpet, pavement

bullets: Classic checkered finish — photographs beautifully
Engineered subfloor levels over any surface
Scales from 50-guest intimate to 200+ gala
Crew installs before room dressing begins
End-of-night takedown included

tent-heater.name: Tent Heater Rental
tent-heater.heroAlt: Propane tent heater rental for cold-weather events — Forever Party Rentals
tent-heater.metaDescription: Propane tent heater rentals from $65/day. Safe for enclosed marquees, rated for Lower Mainland spring/fall evenings. Delivered with every tent booking.
tent-heater.shortDescription: Safe propane tent heaters — rated for enclosed marquees through fall and spring evenings.
tent-heater.longDescription: A marquee tent without heat is a spring problem waiting to happen. Our propane tent heaters are rated for enclosed sidewalled marquees and deliver steady heat across a 20×40 without hot-spotting. Each heater ships with tank, regulator, and safe placement instructions; our crew positions and fires it during tent install. Rule of thumb: one heater per 20×20 of covered space, two for a 20×40, three for a 20×60. Add them to any tent booking — we load them on the same truck.

specs.label: Install
specs.value: Positioned and fired during tent setup

bullets: Propane — tank and regulator included
Rated for enclosed marquee tents
One heater covers ~400 sq ft in spring/fall
Positioned and fired by our crew
Add to any tent booking — same delivery

bistro-string-lights.name: Bistro String Light Rental
bistro-string-lights.heroAlt: Bistro string light rental for tents and outdoor events — Forever Party Rentals
bistro-string-lights.metaDescription: Bistro string light rentals from $55/day. Warm cafe-style globe bulbs on heavy-gauge strand — installed inside tents or over patios. Delivered across Metro Vancouver.
bistro-string-lights.shortDescription: Warm cafe-style globe lights on heavy-gauge strand — the single best upgrade to any tent.
bistro-string-lights.longDescription: If you're renting a tent, rent bistro lights with it. A string of warm globe bulbs overhead is the single highest-impact visual upgrade we sell, and it's not close. We stock heavy-gauge commercial strand with warm-white globe bulbs, pre-sized for 20×40 and 20×60 marquees. Our crew runs the strand during tent install — tied off to the frame, clipped to sidewalls if needed, ready when guest service begins. Also available for pergolas, patios, and backyard events without a tent.

specs.label: Install
specs.value: Run during tent setup by our crew

specs.label: Spares
specs.value: Replacement bulbs included in every kit

bullets: Highest-impact visual upgrade to any tent
Warm-white globe bulbs — warm cafe feel
Heavy-gauge commercial-rated strand
Pre-sized for 20×40 and 20×60 marquees
Installed by our crew during tent setup

tent-sidewall.name: Tent Sidewall Rental
tent-sidewall.heroAlt: Tent sidewall rental — solid and windowed panels for marquees
tent-sidewall.metaDescription: Tent sidewall rentals from $35/day. Solid and cathedral-window panels for marquee tents — add weather protection to any booking. Installed by our crew.
tent-sidewall.shortDescription: Solid and cathedral-window sidewalls — installed as an add-on to any marquee tent.
tent-sidewall.longDescription: Every marquee we rent includes solid sidewalls as standard, but sidewalls can also be rented separately — for popup tents, for weather-swap panels, or for cathedral-window upgrades where you want natural light without exposing the space to wind. Panels clip cleanly to the frame; swap-in during install or mid-event if the weather changes. Available in solid white or cathedral-window style.

specs.label: Weather use
specs.value: Rain, wind, cold — swap mid-event OK

bullets: Solid and cathedral-window options
Clip-on — mid-event swap is fine
Standard on 20-series+ marquees
Add to 10×10 popups for weather protection
Installed and swapped by our crew
